CVE-2021-40402.title: An out-of-bounds read vulnerability exists in the RS-274X apertur ...
CVE-2021-40402.description: An out-of-bounds read vulnerability exists in the RS-274X aperture macro multiple outline primitives functionality of Gerbv 2.7.0 and dev (commit b5f1eacd), and Gerbv forked 2.7.1 and 2.8.0. A specially-crafted Gerber file can lead to information disclosure. An attacker can provide a malicious file to trigger this vulnerability.

CVE-2023-4508.title: A user able to control file input to Gerbv, between versions 2.4. ...
CVE-2023-4508.description: A user able to control file input to Gerbv, between versions 2.4.0 and 2.10.0, can cause a crash and cause denial-of-service with a specially crafted Gerber RS-274X file.
